title: selago villosa
intro: Selago villosa, also known as Cape marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selago villosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Selago villosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health conditions.
